basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website annauniv.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Chemistry, M.E. (Energy Engineering), M.Tech. (Energy Studies, Energy Systems, Chemical Engineering, Nanotechnology)
qualification.details: M.Sc. Chemistry M.E. (Energy Engineering) M.Tech. (Energy Studies, Energy Systems, Chemical Engineering, Nanotechnology)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Project Assistant post at Anna University is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Chemistry, M.E. in Energy Engineering, or M.Tech. in Energy Studies, Energy Systems, Chemical Engineering, or Nanotechnology to be eligible for the Project Assistant role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Anna University Project Assistant recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Anna University has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Assistant position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant post will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Anna University. The link will be provided in the "Important Links" section.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates, as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job type for the Project Assistant post is contractual, as per the official notification.
